name: Earthly Cloud
description: Earthly Satellites — managed remote BuildKit instances with persistent cache. Generous free tier (6000 build-minutes/month). Authenticate with EARTHLY_TOKEN. v1 API exposes satellite lifecycle (launch / wake / sleep / rm) and project management; the actual build is driven by the earthly CLI talking to a selected satellite.

tools.name: list_satellites
tools.description: List satellites for the organization. Args: org.

tools.name: launch_satellite
tools.description: Provision a new satellite. Args: name, size (xsmall|small|medium|large|xlarge), platform (linux/amd64|linux/arm64), feature_flags?.

tools.name: wake_satellite
tools.description: Wake a sleeping satellite so a build can target it. Args: name.

tools.name: sleep_satellite
tools.description: Put a satellite to sleep to stop billing. Args: name.

tools.name: delete_satellite
tools.description: Destroy a satellite permanently. Args: name.

tools.name: list_builds
tools.description: Recent builds for the organization with status, duration, satellite. Args: org, limit?.
